description: Redesign README.md to professional quality inspired by the Only-5 repository style. Centered header, shields.io badges, feature tables, ASCII architecture diagram, directory structure, API documentation, setup instructions, and professional formatting throughout. Adapted for Si-Admin context (customer service admin dashboard, not crypto).
steps: Rewrite README.md with the following structure: 1) Centered div header with project name 'Si-Admin' and tagline 'Sistem Administrasi Cerdas untuk Customer Service', 2) shields.io badges row for TypeScript, Next.js, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, License MIT, 3) Quick navigation links
Add Overview section describing Si-Admin as an intelligent customer service admin dashboard with agent learning capabilities

Add Key Capabilities table (similar to Only-5 format) listing: Knowledge Base Management, 4-Tier Memory System, Self-Improvement Loop, Knowledge Graph, Hybrid Search, Multi-Channel Support, Stock Management, Follow-Up System, Feedback Collection, Agent Health Monitoring

Add ASCII architecture diagram showing the system flow: Admin Dashboard -> API Routes -> Prisma/SQLite, with Agent Intelligence layer (Memory System, Knowledge Base, Learning Loop, Knowledge Graph) and the dashboard features (Chat, Follow Up, Feedback, Stock, Settings)
Add Directory Structure section showing the src/ folder layout with brief descriptions of each major directory

Add Features section with subsections for each major feature area using tables: Dashboard & Analytics, Knowledge Base (Basis Pengetahuan), Agent Intelligence (Kecerdasan Agent), Chat Management, Follow-Up System, Stock Management, Feedback System
Add API Documentation table listing all API endpoints with method, path, and description
Add Tech Stack section with a table listing all technologies and their purpose
Add Setup/Quick Start section with clear numbered steps for installation, database setup, and running the app
Add Configuration section listing environment variables in a table
Add Screenshots section with placeholder comments for future screenshots
Add Contributing section with brief guidelines, and footer with centered 'Built with intelligence in mind' tagline and links
acceptance_criteria: README.md uses div align=center for header section
README.md contains shields.io badge images for TypeScript, Next.js, Prisma, Tailwind CSS, and License
README.md has an ASCII architecture diagram
README.md has tables for features, API routes, tech stack, and configuration
README.md has clear setup instructions with code blocks
README.md renders properly in GitHub markdown
Overall professional quality comparable to the Only-5 repository README
verification: Read README.md and verify it contains all required sections and formatting
Run: npm run build - should still pass (README change should not affect build)
